The midground reveals the street disappearing into a dense curtain of rain, with blurred cityscape beyond. Deep depth of field keeps the entire scene sharp. Lighting is ambient diffused light from an overcast sky, soft and shadowless, with cool desaturated color tones creating a cold rainy atmosphere.
